title: Medenine Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Medenine, with a Z-Score of +3.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Medenine is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 25%, and the wind speed is 17.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling needs, while the CDD is at a critical level.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
